questions.question: What are physical features?
questions.answer: Physical features are natural landforms such as mountains, plains, plateaus, deserts, and islands.

questions.question: Name any two physical features of India.
questions.answer: Mountains and plains.

questions.question: How many major physiographic divisions does India have?
questions.answer: India has six major physiographic divisions.

questions.question: Name the highest mountain range in India.
questions.answer: The Himalayas are the highest mountain range in India.

questions.question: What type of mountains are the Himalayas?
questions.answer: The Himalayas are young fold mountains.

questions.question: Name the three ranges of the Himalayas.
questions.answer: Himadri, Himachal, and Shiwaliks.

questions.question: Which is the northernmost range of the Himalayas?
questions.answer: The Himadri or Great Himalayas.

questions.question: Which rivers form the Northern Plains?
questions.answer: The Indus, Ganga, and Brahmaputra rivers.

questions.question: What type of soil is found in the Northern Plains?
questions.answer: Alluvial soil.

questions.question: What is the Bhabar region?
questions.answer: Bhabar is a narrow belt where rivers deposit pebbles along the foothills of the Himalayas.

questions.question: What is the Terai region?
questions.answer: The Terai is a marshy and swampy region south of the Bhabar belt.

questions.question: What is Bhangar?
questions.answer: Bhangar is the older alluvial soil found in the Northern Plains.

questions.question: What is Khadar?
questions.answer: Khadar is the newer alluvial soil deposited by rivers.

questions.question: What is the Peninsular Plateau?
questions.answer: The Peninsular Plateau is an ancient tableland composed of igneous and metamorphic rocks.

questions.question: Name the two divisions of the Peninsular Plateau.
questions.answer: Central Highlands and Deccan Plateau.

questions.question: Which Ghats are higher in India?
questions.answer: The Western Ghats are higher than the Eastern Ghats.

questions.question: What is the Indian Desert also known as?
questions.answer: The Thar Desert.

questions.question: Name the main river in the Indian Desert.
questions.answer: The Luni River.

questions.question: What are coastal plains?
questions.answer: Coastal plains are narrow strips of land along the sea coast.

questions.question: Name the two coastal plains of India.
questions.answer: Western Coastal Plains and Eastern Coastal Plains.

questions.question: Which lake is the largest saltwater lake in India?
questions.answer: Chilika Lake.

questions.question: Name the two island groups of India.
questions.answer: Lakshadweep Islands and Andaman & Nicobar Islands.

questions.question: Which island group lies in the Arabian Sea?
questions.answer: Lakshadweep Islands.

questions.question: Which island group lies in the Bay of Bengal?
questions.answer: Andaman and Nicobar Islands.

questions.question: Which is the highest peak in India?
questions.answer: Kanchenjunga.
